name: bb-browser
description: 面向 AI 的 Tampermonkey/Userscript 自动化开发工作台，支持脚本生成、安装、调试、回归和导出。

scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @bb-browser/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @bb-browser/cli build && corepack pnpm --filter @bb-browser/daemon build && corepack pnpm --filter @bb-browser/mcp build && corepack pnpm --filter @bb-browser/userscript-mcp build && corepack pnpm --filter @bb-browser/extension build && corepack pnpm build:release
scripts.build:release: corepack pnpm exec tsup && corepack pnpm build:extension
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @bb-browser/shared test && corepack pnpm --filter @bb-browser/userscript-mcp test
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm exec tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && corepack pnpm exec tsc --noEmit -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json && corepack pnpm exec tsc --noEmit -p packages/daemon/tsconfig.json && corepack pnpm exec tsc --noEmit -p packages/mcp/tsconfig.json && corepack pnpm exec tsc --noEmit -p packages/userscript-mcp/tsconfig.json && corepack pnpm exec tsc --noEmit -p packages/extension/tsconfig.json
scripts.verify: corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm build && npm pack --dry-run
